goal: Input one open-source empty-room image and transform it into a Nordic-style living room while preserving the floor, windows, walls, camera viewpoint, and room structure. Use the latest verified stack: SAM 3/SAM 3.1 + DINO-X for perception, Depth Anything 3 + Depth Pro + UniDepthV2 for depth/layout, OpenRouter openai/gpt-5.4 for planning, FLUX.2 [dev] for editing, and Qwen3-VL + SigLIP 2 for verification.

actions.name: define_style_target
actions.style: Scandinavian / Nordic living room when requested

actions.name: harmonize_lighting
actions.requires: preserve natural light and window visibility

actions.name: apply_human_feedback
style_correction: 更空 / more open and airy
更高级 / more premium, refined minimal luxury
在当前北欧基调上减少堆砌感，往 minimal editorial / premium Scandi 方向微调
preserve: 保留墙面颜色，不改变墙色 / preserve existing wall color
保留窗户的位置、尺寸与可见性 / preserve window positions, sizes, and visibility
保持窗前采光区域通透 / keep window daylight zones clear
地板颜色尽量不要变，优先严格保留现有地板色调 / preserve floor color as much as possible
保持原始房间结构与相机视角 / preserve room geometry and camera viewpoint
保持门洞与通行关系 / preserve door geometry and circulation
reduce: 减少植物数量，若有多盆植物则压缩到 0-1 个小型点缀 / reduce plants to none or at most one small accent plant
减少家具与装饰密度 / reduce overall furniture and decor density
减少视觉杂物与小摆件 / reduce clutter and small accessories
减少靠窗家具体量与贴窗程度 / reduce furniture mass and proximity near windows
remove: 移除任何挡窗或压窗的家具、植物、落地灯、边几、装饰物 / remove any furniture, plants, lamps, side tables, or decor that block or crowd the windows
移除不必要的多余植物陈设 / remove nonessential plant decor
add: 如需补充高级感，仅允许少量高质感单品：简洁艺术画、低对比软装、克制材质点缀 / if needed, add only a few high-end restrained accents such as simple art, low-contrast textiles, or refined material details
优先通过材质、比例、留白提升高级感，而不是增加物件数量 / elevate luxury through materiality, proportion, and negative space rather than adding more items
forbid: 禁止遮挡任何窗户玻璃、窗框或主要采光面 / do not block any window glass, frame, or primary daylight area
禁止明显改变墙面颜色 / do not noticeably change wall color
禁止明显改变地板颜色 / do not noticeably change floor color
禁止过度填满空间 / do not overfill the room
禁止引入廉价感或繁杂装饰 / avoid cheap-looking or busy decorative styling
actions.rerun_scope: targeted furniture-and-decor revision only; preserve architecture and materials

next_impl: Move this planner call into OpenRouter openai/gpt-5.4 with spatial/layout JSON as context and require strict action JSON.

human_feedback.raw_feedback: 更空、更高级、减少植物、保留墙色和窗户，不要挡窗，地板颜色也尽量不要变
style_correction: 更空 / more open and airy
更高级 / more premium, refined minimal luxury
在当前北欧基调上减少堆砌感，往 minimal editorial / premium Scandi 方向微调

保持窗前采光区域通透 / keep window daylight zones clear

保持门洞与通行关系 / preserve door geometry and circulation

减少家具与装饰密度 / reduce overall furniture and decor density
减少视觉杂物与小摆件 / reduce clutter and small accessories

移除不必要的多余植物陈设 / remove nonessential plant decor
add: 如需补充高级感，仅允许少量高质感单品：简洁艺术画、低对比软装、克制材质点缀 / if needed, add only a few high-end restrained accents such as simple art, low-contrast textiles, or refined material details
优先通过材质、比例、留白提升高级感，而不是增加物件数量 / elevate luxury through materiality, proportion, and negative space rather than adding more items
forbid: 禁止遮挡任何窗户玻璃、窗框或主要采光面 / do not block any window glass, frame, or primary daylight area
禁止明显改变墙面颜色 / do not noticeably change wall color
禁止明显改变地板颜色 / do not noticeably change floor color
禁止过度填满空间 / do not overfill the room
禁止引入廉价感或繁杂装饰 / avoid cheap-looking or busy decorative styling
layout: 保持主通道与窗边区域更开阔 / keep main circulation and window-side zones more open
家具布局可基本延续当前方案，但整体更疏、更克制 / largely keep current furniture plan but make spacing looser and more restrained
若沙发或边几靠窗过近，向室内轻微回撤以避免挡窗感 / if sofa or side table sits too close to windows, pull slightly inward
确保门口与窗前留有清晰净空 / maintain clear access near the door and in front of windows
human_feedback.rerun_scope: targeted furniture-and-decor revision only; preserve architecture and materials
human_feedback.render_strategy: 局部精修 / targeted edit pass with strict preservation locks on wall color, windows, floor color, door geometry, and camera; adjust only furniture/decor density, plant count, and window clearance
